title: Spain rejects White House comments that it now backs US-Israel war on Iran – Europe live
summary_full: The White House press secretary earlier said Spain had agreed to ‘cooperate with the US military’ after Donald Trump threatened to cut trade to SpainNordic correspondentThe bank of Sweden has released new guidance advising Swedish households to keep a “warchest” of 1,000 SEK (about £81) per adult amid the current global instability.“It is a recommendation. It is based on the Swedish Consumer Agency’s calculations of how much food people tend to get through per month.” Continue reading...
